classifications.adaptation-required: The capability has a v1 replacement with an intentional request, response, or semantic migration.
classifications.equivalent: The same product capability is available through the governed v1 contract.
classifications.retained-v0: No public v1 replacement exists yet; the route remains supported under the frozen v0 contract.

responseChanges: Consume the documented API v1 resource envelope and error model.

semanticChanges: Calendar token feeds remain on API v0 until the calendar domain is released in v1.
